scripts.icons:generate: pnpm icons:appicon && pnpm icons:menubar && pnpm icons:extension
scripts.icons:appicon: for s in 16 32 64 128 256 512 1024; do resvg logo.svg -w $s -h $s apps/macos/app/Assets.xcassets/AppIcon.appiconset/icon_$s.png; done
scripts.icons:extension: for s in 16 32 48 96 128; do resvg logo.svg -w $s -h $s apps/extension/public/icon/$s.png; done
